items.name: Two Receivers, One Space
items.trigger_expression: classic_10 + false_9 both dropping between the lines
items.warning_copy: A Classic Ten and a False Nine both dropping between the lines congest the same zone and leave nobody stretching the defence. One of them needs to become a runner.

items.name: No-Width Flank
items.trigger_expression: inside_forward + inverted_fb on the same side
items.warning_copy: An Inside Forward and an Inverted Fullback on the same flank put both players in the half-space with zero width, which is easy for a defence to cover. Pair each inside-mover with a width supplier.

items.name: Double Exposure Flank
items.trigger_expression: touchline_winger (high awr, low dwr) + overlapping_fb (high awr) on the same side
items.warning_copy: A high-attacking, low-tracking winger paired with a high-work-rate overlapping fullback opens the same flank as a corridor on every transition.

items.name: Sterile Pivot
items.trigger_expression: anchor_destroyer + anchor_destroyer double pivot in a possession identity
items.warning_copy: Two Destroyers in the double pivot leave nobody to break lines in a possession identity, though the same pairing is legitimate in a low-block identity.

items.name: Uncovered Aggression
items.trigger_expression: stopper_cb + stopper_cb, or a stopper_cb with no covering partner or sweeper_keeper, behind a high line
items.warning_copy: Two Stopper centre backs, or one Stopper with no covering partner or sweeper keeper, behind a high line leaves the space in behind undefended.

items.name: Bus With No Outlet
items.trigger_expression: low_block_counter identity with no target_man or elite-pace runner_in_behind
items.warning_copy: A low-block identity with no target man or elite-pace runner up front means the block never exits its own third.

items.name: Third-Man Pattern Without a Bounce Player
items.trigger_expression: A5 or A4 in the starter set with no target_man, false_9, or classic_10 on the pitch
items.warning_copy: Third-man patterns need a bounce player: without a target man, false nine, or ten profile on the pitch, there is nobody to play off.
